description: Canonical vertical pack metadata for MK-01 marketplace work. Packaged graphs live under catalog/packaged-workflows/; install uses POST /api/v1/workflow/install-from-catalog. Each pack has pack_semver (see catalog/README.md). Optional workflow_variants list simple vs complex graphs for the same vertical (complex = booking/API-ready prompts); default install uses workflow_template.packaged_definition_ref.

packs.summary: After-hours and overflow voice flow for symptom triage, scheduling handoff, and scripted guardrails—designed for PHI minimization in the agent layer.
use_cases: screening triage
appointment confirm/remind (confirm_remind variant + reschedule_appointment HTTP tool after install)
post-visit follow-up prompts
provider or visit booking with scheduling API (booking_complex variant + book_slot HTTP tool after install)
optional paid concierge / priority visit (concierge_complex variant + enroll_concierge_visit HTTP tool after install)
packs.cost_latency_estimate_band: Medium latency (regional LLM + STT/TTS); cost scales with minutes and model tier

workflow_variants.label: Linear triage (default install)
workflow_variants.description: Minimal start → triage → end graph for fast compliance demos.

workflow_variants.label: Booking-ready prompts
workflow_variants.description: Richer scheduling narrative; import JSON via POST /workflow/create/definition or swap packaged ref before install when supported. Add HTTP book_slot tool after install; map response_mapping to analytics.

workflow_variants.label: Confirm / remind / reschedule (no-show reduction)
workflow_variants.description: Reminder-style prompts for upcoming visits; wire HTTP reschedule_appointment to {{scheduling_api_base_url}}/appointments/reschedule after install. See runbook no-show reduction happy path.

workflow_variants.label: Optional concierge / paid visit
workflow_variants.description: Triage then optional paid priority visit enrollment; wire HTTP enroll_concierge_visit to {{billing_api_base_url}}/api/v1/visits/enroll after install. See runbook concierge happy path + PARTNER_REVIEW.

analytics_hooks: After catalog install, workflows expose MK-01 catalog_slug — filter /analytics and /analytics/calls by that slug.
Prove triage → handoff with outcome_key in gathered_context and HTTP tool mapped_data on call detail.
booking_complex: book_slot; confirm_remind: reschedule_appointment; concierge_complex: enroll_concierge_visit + catalog_variant_id filter.
Export CSV for booking / reminder / concierge funnel QA.

packs.summary: Order status, return windows, and store hours with HTTP tool hooks to OMS or helpdesk—reduces tier-1 load while staying policy-safe.
use_cases: where is my order (WISMO)
return window FAQ
store hours and pickup
in-store service or pickup-window booking (booking_complex variant + reserve_pickup_slot HTTP tool after install)
warranty or subscription upsell after WISMO (upsell_complex variant + offer_warranty_addon HTTP tool after install)
collections / payment promise capture after balance inquiry (collections_complex variant + capture_payment_promise HTTP tool after install)
packs.cost_latency_estimate_band: Low–medium latency for FAQ; higher if live order lookup tools add RTT

workflow_variants.label: WISMO FAQ (default install)
workflow_variants.description: Minimal FAQ flow for quick demos.

workflow_variants.label: Pickup / service booking prompts
workflow_variants.description: Adds scheduling language for pickup windows; pair with HTTP reserve_pickup_slot and OMS tools when creds exist.

workflow_variants.label: WISMO + warranty / subscription upsell
workflow_variants.description: Resolve WISMO first, then offer add-on; wire HTTP offer_warranty_addon to {{product_api_base_url}}/api/v1/offers/attach after install. See runbook paid upsell happy path.

workflow_variants.label: Collections / payment promise
workflow_variants.description: Capture voluntary payment-plan intent; wire HTTP capture_payment_promise to {{collections_api_base_url}}/api/v1/payment-promises after install. See runbook collections happy path + PARTNER_REVIEW.

analytics_hooks: Filter analytics by catalog_slug retail-wismo-faq after install; compare tool_names (e.g. OMS) across calls.
booking_complex: track reserve_pickup_slot; upsell_complex: filter tool_name offer_warranty_addon and catalog_variant_id=upsell_complex.
collections_complex: filter tool_name capture_payment_promise and catalog_variant_id=collections_complex.
CSV export on call list supports QM sampling for WISMO vs booking vs upsell funnel experiments.

packs.summary: Short qualification and onboarding check-in calls with CRM-friendly variables—pipeline velocity without full SDR staffing.
use_cases: trial nurture
PQL voice qualification
onboarding check-in
demo or customer-success calendar booking (booking_complex variant + book_demo HTTP tool after install)
renewal / QBR expansion (renewal_complex variant + book_qbr HTTP tool after install)
trial → paid upgrade handoff (conversion_complex variant + update_crm_deal_stage HTTP tool after install)
packs.cost_latency_estimate_band: Medium (conversation + optional tool calls to CRM)

workflow_variants.label: Trial nurture (default install)
workflow_variants.description: Linear qualification flow.

workflow_variants.label: Demo / CS booking prompts
workflow_variants.description: Emphasizes calendar booking; add HTTP book_demo when buyer connects calendar API.

workflow_variants.label: Renewal / QBR expansion
workflow_variants.description: CS renewal + QBR scheduling; wire HTTP book_qbr to {{scheduling_api_base_url}} and optional sync_crm_health to {{crm_api_base_url}} after install. See runbook renewal happy path.

workflow_variants.label: Trial → paid conversion
workflow_variants.description: PQL then paid upgrade handoff; wire HTTP update_crm_deal_stage to {{crm_api_base_url}}/api/v1/deals/stage after install. See runbook trial-to-paid happy path.

analytics_hooks: Filter by slug b2b-saas-trial-nurture for PQL → demo narratives; tie CRM stage variables to outcome_key.
booking_complex: book_demo; renewal_complex: book_qbr; conversion_complex: filter tool_name update_crm_deal_stage and catalog_variant_id=conversion_complex.
Export CSV from call list for trial-stage, conversion, and renewal cohort reviews.

packs.summary: First-notice-of-loss scripting, policy FAQ, and adjuster callback scheduling with compliance-first guardrails—not legal advice or coverage determinations.
use_cases: FNOL guidance (scripted intake)
policy FAQ
claims portal / phone handoff
adjuster or inspection callback (booking_complex variant + schedule_adjuster_callback HTTP tool after install)
quote intent qualification (quote_complex variant + capture_quote_intent HTTP tool after install)
live claims status lookup (claims_lookup_complex variant + lookup_claim_status HTTP tool after install)
packs.cost_latency_estimate_band: Low–medium latency for FAQ; higher if live claims lookup tools add RTT

workflow_variants.label: FNOL FAQ (default install)
workflow_variants.description: Minimal FNOL + policy FAQ flow for quick compliance demos.

workflow_variants.label: Adjuster callback scheduling
workflow_variants.description: Adds adjuster callback scheduling language; wire HTTP schedule_adjuster_callback to {{scheduling_api_base_url}}/api/v1/appointments after install. See runbook booking-complex happy path.

workflow_variants.label: Quote intent qualification
workflow_variants.description: Capture quote-ready intent for licensed agent follow-up; wire HTTP capture_quote_intent to {{quoting_api_base_url}}/api/v1/quotes/intent after install. See runbook quote happy path + PARTNER_REVIEW.

workflow_variants.label: Claims status lookup
workflow_variants.description: Tokenized claims status lookup; wire HTTP lookup_claim_status to {{claims_api_base_url}}/api/v1/claims/status after install. See runbook claims lookup happy path + PARTNER_REVIEW.

analytics_hooks: Filter analytics by catalog_slug insurance-fnol-faq after install; compare FNOL vs callback funnel.
booking_complex: filter tool_name schedule_adjuster_callback and catalog_variant_id=booking_complex.
quote_complex: filter tool_name capture_quote_intent and catalog_variant_id=quote_complex.
claims_lookup_complex: filter tool_name lookup_claim_status and catalog_variant_id=claims_lookup_complex.
CSV export on call list supports QM sampling for FNOL containment experiments.

packs.summary: Concierge FAQ plus reservation modify prompts with PMS-ready HTTP hooks—24/7 guest voice without full front-desk staffing.
use_cases: cancellation policy FAQ
amenity and property FAQ
reservation modify (booking_complex variant + modify_reservation HTTP tool after install)
cancellation fee waiver / credit (waiver_complex variant + apply_cancellation_waiver HTTP tool after install)
loyalty room upgrade offer (upsell_complex variant + offer_room_upgrade HTTP tool after install)
packs.cost_latency_estimate_band: Low–medium latency for FAQ; higher if live PMS modify tools add RTT

workflow_variants.label: Concierge FAQ (default install)
workflow_variants.description: Minimal FAQ flow for quick demos.

workflow_variants.label: Booking modify prompts
workflow_variants.description: Adds PMS modify language; wire HTTP modify_reservation to {{pms_api_base_url}}/api/v1/reservations/modify after install. See runbook booking-complex happy path.

workflow_variants.label: Cancellation fee waiver / credit
workflow_variants.description: Policy-engine waiver or credit intent; wire HTTP apply_cancellation_waiver to {{policy_api_base_url}}/api/v1/cancellations/waiver after install. See runbook waiver happy path + PARTNER_REVIEW.

workflow_variants.label: Loyalty room upgrade offer
workflow_variants.description: Optional CRS room upgrade after FAQ; wire HTTP offer_room_upgrade to {{crs_api_base_url}}/api/v1/offers/attach after install. See runbook loyalty upgrade happy path.

analytics_hooks: Filter analytics by catalog_slug hospitality-travel-concierge after install.
booking_complex: filter tool_name modify_reservation and catalog_variant_id=booking_complex.
waiver_complex: filter tool_name apply_cancellation_waiver and catalog_variant_id=waiver_complex.
upsell_complex: filter tool_name offer_room_upgrade and catalog_variant_id=upsell_complex.
CSV export supports FAQ vs modify funnel QA.

packs.summary: Scripted card lost/stolen guidance, non-PCI balance and payment redirect FAQ, and branch appointment scheduling with fraud guardrails—not full account servicing or PCI capture on the call.
use_cases: card lost/stolen scripted flow
balance and payment redirect FAQ (non-PCI)
branch hours and location FAQ
branch appointment scheduling (booking_complex variant + schedule_branch_appointment HTTP tool after install)
tokenized balance lookup after identity verify (balance_lookup_complex variant + lookup_account_balance HTTP tool after install)
card block / fraud report API handoff (card_block_complex variant + report_card_lost_stolen HTTP tool after install)
packs.cost_latency_estimate_band: Low–medium latency for FAQ; higher if live tokenized lookup tools add RTT

workflow_variants.label: Banking FAQ (default install)
workflow_variants.description: Minimal card and branch FAQ flow for compliance demos.

workflow_variants.label: Branch appointment scheduling
workflow_variants.description: Adds branch appointment scheduling language; wire HTTP schedule_branch_appointment to {{scheduling_api_base_url}}/api/v1/appointments after install. See runbook booking-complex happy path.

workflow_variants.label: Tokenized balance lookup
workflow_variants.description: Tokenized account balance lookup after identity verify; wire HTTP lookup_account_balance to {{banking_api_base_url}}/api/v1/accounts/balance after install. See runbook balance lookup happy path + PARTNER_REVIEW.

workflow_variants.label: Card block / fraud report
workflow_variants.description: Tokenized card block after lost/stolen report; wire HTTP report_card_lost_stolen to {{cards_api_base_url}}/api/v1/cards/block after install. See runbook card block happy path + PARTNER_REVIEW.

analytics_hooks: Filter analytics by catalog_slug financial-services-banking-faq after install; compare FAQ vs branch booking funnel.
booking_complex: filter tool_name schedule_branch_appointment and catalog_variant_id=booking_complex.
balance_lookup_complex: filter tool_name lookup_account_balance and catalog_variant_id=balance_lookup_complex.
card_block_complex: filter tool_name report_card_lost_stolen and catalog_variant_id=card_block_complex.
CSV export on call list supports QM sampling for card-safety vs scheduling experiments.

packs.summary: One voice template for multi-site SMB and franchise brands: location FAQ, hours and services answers, and lead callback scheduling with optional CRM hooks.
use_cases: multi-location hours and services FAQ
location directory handoff
lead callback scheduling (booking_complex variant + schedule_lead_callback HTTP tool after install)
talk-to-location call routing (location_router_complex variant + route_call_to_location HTTP tool after install)
CRM lead capture after FAQ (lead_capture_complex variant + capture_lead_intent HTTP tool after install)
packs.cost_latency_estimate_band: Low–medium latency for FAQ; higher if live location directory or CRM tools add RTT

workflow_variants.label: Multi-location FAQ (default install)
workflow_variants.description: Minimal multi-site FAQ flow for quick franchise demos.

workflow_variants.label: Lead callback scheduling
workflow_variants.description: Adds lead callback scheduling language; wire HTTP schedule_lead_callback to {{scheduling_api_base_url}}/api/v1/appointments after install. See runbook booking-complex happy path.

workflow_variants.label: Talk-to-location router
workflow_variants.description: Route callers to the right store or handoff target; wire HTTP route_call_to_location to {{locations_api_base_url}}/api/v1/locations/route after install. See runbook location router happy path + PARTNER_REVIEW.

workflow_variants.label: CRM lead capture
workflow_variants.description: Capture sales or service lead intent for CRM follow-up; wire HTTP capture_lead_intent to {{crm_api_base_url}}/api/v1/leads/intent after install. See runbook lead capture happy path + PARTNER_REVIEW.

analytics_hooks: Filter analytics by catalog_slug smb-franchise-location-faq after install; compare FAQ vs callback funnel.
booking_complex: filter tool_name schedule_lead_callback and catalog_variant_id=booking_complex.
location_router_complex: filter tool_name route_call_to_location and catalog_variant_id=location_router_complex.
lead_capture_complex: filter tool_name capture_lead_intent and catalog_variant_id=lead_capture_complex.
CSV export supports QM sampling for multi-location deflection experiments.
